items.text:
🌷CASTING CALL🍄
Hi Lovelies!

For my thesis film 'I Herde a Fly Buzz' I am looking for 2 Actresses and 1 Actor. It is a Queer Folk Horrot set in the 1300s to shoot Mid June. Collaborative by food and transport provided! As well as any headshots or showreel footage. London Based.

Felis- Mid 20s, wild-hearted, yearns for independence. 

Ingerid- Mid 20s, witch-type, living on the land in a rejection of society. 

David- Late 20s/30s, devout Catholic, gruff, ideally with a beard.

Brief: Unfulfilled in her suffocating marriage Felis clings to her affair with the woman in the woods Ingerid for help, which leads her devout husband into a final confrontation.

If interested please reach out to me via Facebook or Email at sterlingknightfilm@gmail.com🍄🐚🌷

Casting for a female lead for a feature on ITV Sport - PAID OPPORTUNITY
Age: 30+

Date: 27th May

Location: London

Must have right to work in UK

Must have basic cardistry experience (shuffling, cutting decks, card handling etc.) and long painted nails

Please send headshots and showreel to Bethan.Clargo@itv.com

Aldborough Rd North
Aldborough Hatch
Ilford

The audition session will include:
✨ Dance workshop
✨ Singing workshop
✨ Drama read-through
✨ Optional solo 1-1 auditions for those who choose
Auditions are FREE as part of the ELIXR Productions package, with membership officially starting in June.
Please bring water, wear comfortable clothing and bring a printed recent photo or headshot to help us with forms and auditions.
This is a supportive, exciting opportunity for young performers to build confidence, develop performance skills and be part of full-scale productions with ELIXR Productions.
📩 Message us now for more information or to register your interest.
ELIXR Productions
Inspiring Expression. Creating Theatre.

items.text:
SEEKING HMUA PAID
Looking for a HMUA to assist on a Non-Union feature film on Monday, May 18th and Tuesday may 19th. Looking for someone who can help with light glam on female talent and touch ups on background actors! This is a Paid position! 

Location: Pittsburg, PA 

Dates: May 18th-19th 

Rate: $250/12hrs

To apply, email me: sarah.turnermua@gmail.com

Even if you’re not Available for both days, please email me specifying which day you are available if interested! You will also likely not be needed the entire 12 hours but will still be paid the full amount regardless. KIT NOT PROVIDED, BRING YOUR OWN SUPPLIES! Food/crafty will be provided on set and you will receive on screen credit!

items.text:
Looking for A2/Sound Engineer for ‘Next to Normal’ (CHI)
My company Scene Five Productions is in search of an A2/Sound Engineer for our upcoming production of Next to Normal.

We are looking for a candidate who is comfortable live-mixing our actors mics. 

Our production runs over two weekends, at the Bramble Arts Loft: July 24th-26th and July 31-August 2nd. Additionally, our tech days are July 20th-23rd.

This position will have a stipend of $500.

If interested, please email scenefiveproductions@gmail.com with your resume!

Meet Lisa from Shoes Off At The Door — 
We’ve put together a brief monologue for those looking to audition for her character!! WE STILL GOT ROLES TO FILL SIGN UP NOW🔥🔥

NO experience required.
Just bring authenticity, energy, and emotion.

items.text:
Daqui a pouco o último
LOVE de Ana Lázaro 

14 a 16 MAIO 
Quinta a sábado às 21h30

Auditório Municipal do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 
Biblioteca Municipal 
Online em BOL.PT
https://www.bol.pt/.../176809-love_de_ana_lazaro-aud_m.../

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil.
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde, em tantas partes do mundo, se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans. Sejam estes direitos concretos na legislação, sejam eles no combate a amarras de pensamento e dogmatismos vários.
As dinâmicas de híper conectividade da vida virtual - nas quais se encontram grandes benefícios mas simultaneamente perigos e assoberbamento – colocam-nos perante cenários de comparação, a insegurança; as falsas verdades e desconfiança; solidão – aos quais simultaneamente pertencem mas querem também escapar. Arquiteturas de um mundo digital – uma segunda realidade e uma segunda pele - que parece altamente acolhedor e inteiramente hostil.

com  JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA 
projeto TÁS NA MIRA 
coordenadora  INÊS MARCELINO
ISABELA JOÃO, ROSALBA MBANG, VANECIA RODRIGUES 

encenação, espaço cénico  MARIA JOÃO LUÍS 
vídeo  JOSÉ BUDHA
música  JAIME FILIPE 
assistência de encenação  SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO
assistência de produção  FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA 
direção de produção, luz  PEDRO DOMINGOS 

produção  TEATRO DA TERRA  2026
M/12

parceria
Município do Seixal

apoio 
República Portuguesa - Cultura, Juventude, Desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy** 
**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

Faculty: 
**Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia 🇭🇷 
**Remith Ramesh**, India 🇮🇳 
**Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark 🇩🇰 
**Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany 🇩🇪 

Guest artists: 
**Aparna Devi**, India 🇮🇳 
**Claudia Munyengabe**, Burundi 🇧🇮 
**Tarja Nyberg**, Finland 🇫🇮 
**Toh Varatta**, Thailand 🇹🇭 
**Burcu Halacoglu**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Gehad Hossam El Din**, Egypt 🇪🇬 

>> Michael Chekhov Acting Technique 
>> Organic Breathing & Image Work
>> Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre (Kerala, India) 
>> Physical Theatre and Dance (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 
>> The Actor’s Energy and Presence 
>> Intercultural Theatre in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS** 
This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**
There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 
The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/
Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK

items.text:
ANTIGONE 

We are a new London-based international theatre ensemble. We are looking for an actor who identifies as male to play Haemon in our next RND project of "Antigone". Playing age 20-35, Haemon is Creon's son and Antigone's groom. Unpaid with expenses. Actor must be free in late July this year fir a show in Camden, but we working to stage it elsewhere in the future for a longer run. We need the actor to be free in evenings and/or week-ends  from now till the end of July. We can be flexible with rehearsal dates.

Pm me to get in touch

items.text:
‼️CASTING CALL‼️ 

We are currently casting for our upcoming play ‘The Hostel’, running at The Courtyard Theatre as a part of Camden Fringe from August 28th-30th.

To apply, please go to https://tinyurl.com/THEHOSTEL. You will be asked to select material from one of our audition packets, along with a slate and current CV. 

🚨APPLICATIONS CLOSE 11:59pm ON FRIDAY, MAY 29th
🗓️RECALLS TO TAKE PLACE ON SUNDAY, JUNE 7th

We are looking for strong, collaborative actors, and encourage people from all backgrounds to apply. Roles may be played by anyone* regardless of gender, race, ethnicity etc!

Rehearsals will run from August 10th-27th, and all actors will receive a £150 stipend plus a split of any profits we make. 

We look forward to reviewing your submissions!

*Please note that the actor playing the ‘MALE SWING’ must have knife training/experience

GOOD LUCK! The HOSTEL'

PILNIE szukamy mężczyzny do roli OCHRONIARZA (security) do nowego serialu „In Cold Eyes”.

Zdjęcia: 18 maja
Stawka: 400 zł brutto za 1 dzień zdjęciowy

Szukamy wysokiego, dobrze zbudowanego, charakterystycznego mężczyzny o typowej prezencji ochroniarza.
Wzrost orientacyjnie od 180 cm.

Szukamy wyłącznie osób z Bydgoszczy lub okolic, które mogą samodzielnie dojechać na plan zdjęciowy.

Wszystkie zainteresowane osoby proszę o wiadomość prywatną wraz ze zdjęciem i wzrostem 🙂

items.text:
I’m a film director. On side I shoot portraits -
this month I'm opening my book to build out my Berlin portfolio by the price that you choose yourself 🙌

For: actors, musicians, writers, designers, freelancers, anyone in the Berlin creative world who needs strong images of themselves and is tired of looking like another LinkedIn headshot.

The offer: 

— Portraits, Polaroids and snaps 

— 30 min session, outdoor or studio in Kreuzberg 

— 10–15 edited images delivered the next day 

— Full usage rights, yours to do whatever you want with 

— Portfolio rate: €50–120, choose the price that fits you

I shoot the way I direct. I'll come in knowing who you are, I'll watch how you move, and we'll find what's actually in your character

Five slots left in May. DM me to book one.

items.text:
Heute Abend geht mein großes Videoprojekt zum Michael Jackson Film 2026 in die Premiere: https://lnkd.in/dxjKE739 

Michael Jackson Film 2026: Das große 46-Minuten-Dossier! 

Kein kurzer Trailer-Kommentar. Keine schnelle Reaktion. Sondern eine filmjournalistische Tiefenreise durch einen der spannendsten und zugleich heikelsten Musikfilme der kommenden Kinozeit. 

Kann ein Biopic über Michael Jackson überhaupt ehrlich erzählen, ohne zur Legendenpflege oder zur Abrechnung zu werden? 

Und weshalb könnte gerade die Entstehung dieses Films fast so spannend sein wie der Film selbst? 

Ich habe viele Details zusammengetragen, verdichtet und in ein 46-minütiges Gesamtwerk gebracht, das nicht nur Fans, sondern auch Filmfreunde, Popkultur-Beobachter und kritische Zuschauer abholen soll.

Heute Abend in der Premiere. 

Schau rein, denk mit, widersprich gerne und schreib mir danach Deine Sicht in die Kommentare. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#MichaelJacksonFilm2026 #MichaelMovie #MichaelJackson #Kino2026 #KarrideoReportage

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'MJ BIOPIC SKANDAL- SKANDAL-WAHRHEIT! C 46-MINUTEN-DOSSIER 46- Michael 46-Minuten-Dossier- Dossier- mit und von Christian ChristianWeiBe-KrrideoTV Weiße KarrideoTV'

Working on fret leveling and polishing to improve the feel, precision and playability of this guitar.

When frets are uneven or worn, the guitar can have: ✔ Fret buzz

A proper fret level and polish helps the instrument feel smooth, clean and professional again.

items.text:
Most actors don’t lose roles because they can’t act.
They lose them because nobody taught them what actually matters in the room.

Most classes focus on scenes and technique. This class focuses on the part many actors are missing:
• Audition technique  
• Presence  
• Confidence under pressure  
• On camera connection  
• The business side of acting  
• What casting directors are actually looking for  

Raquel Gardner brings both acting and casting experience, giving actors real insight into how to stand out professionally, not just creatively.

Actors never stop learning. Neither should your craft.

Los Angeles • 303 Studios

https://303studiola.com/acting-class

818-223-7829

items.text:
BACKGROUND CASTING CALL - BOWLING ALLEY PATRONS
Hi!

We are looking for background for our upcoming short film filming May 20th - 22nd, 2026.

We are looking for a DIVERSE RANGE of actors, of all ages 18+, nationalities, and gender identities, to play a wide range of BOWLING ALLEY PATRONS.

Please note this is an unpaid opportunity but you will be provided lots of very delicious food and lunch on set!!

We are filming in Port Coquitlam.

Please let us know which days you are available, you can choose to do only one of the days, two, or all three days!

If interested, please email or DM me or fill out the following form —[ https://forms.gle/zaSui6WJ2YCMz62E6](https://forms.gle/zaSui6WJ2YCMz62E6)

items.title: New casting update

items.text:
CASTING CALL – Principal Roles – 1 Female, 2 Males
*Short Film* 
# **"The Follower" **

Written & Directed by Lucas Cunningham, Produced by Ellie Griffin

Logline: *A struggling country singer joins a platform that gives her subscribers real-time access to her location. On a mountain getaway with her boyfriend, one of them shows up — and she finds they have more in common than she thought.*

Casting the following Roles:

**ALY REARDAN **Lead / Age 22-29 / Woman / PAID

*A struggling country singer from a lower-middle-class family. Wry sense of humor and an old-school work ethic. Tough and scrappy, she knows she’s got the talent, but she’s not sure how many more setbacks she can take. At least one. She loves her boyfriend, Colby, but he just doesn’t get it. Sometimes it feels like no one does.*

SKILLS: Sings. Preferred: guitar, stage combat experience

NUDITY**/**INTIMACY: Two scenes partially clothed in bed, moderate kissing & embrace Intimacy Director will be present.

**STEPHEN**** **Lead / Age 20-29 / Man / PAID

*An awkward mountain kid who’s been working in the same gas station since he was fifteen. A sensitive soul in a harsh world. He’s charming when he makes an effort, but he’s scared off every real friend he’s ever had. Spends too much time in the woods, on YouTube, and Thinking About Things.*

SKILLS: Preferred: sings, stage combat experience

NUDITY/INTIMACY: Two scenes partially clothed in bed, Intimacy Director will be present.

**COLBY**** **Lead /Age 23-33 / Man / PAID

*A rich kid with a heart of gold and a 401k. Nothing’s ever been that hard for him, but he turned out pretty good anyway. He loves making things easier for the people around him, and he can’t understand why his girlfriend Aly won’t let him help her. In turns bold, jealous, and considerate, he’s the model modern boyfriend – or at least close enough.*

SKILLS: Driving

NUDITY/INTIMACY: Moderate kissing & embrace, One scene partially clothed in bed, Intimacy Director will be present.

# ***Video Auditions will also be accepted***

**Shoot Dates & Location****: **End of June. Boulder (& surrounding mountains), Colorado 

**Interested? Please email Ellie Griffin, Producer, **ellietgriffin@gmail.com** with headshot, resume, audition preference**

# **"The Follower" **

Written & Directed by Lucas Cunningham, Produced by Ellie Griffin

Logline: *A struggling country singer joins a platform that gives her subscribers real-time access to her location. On a mountain getaway with her boyfriend, one of them shows up — and she finds they have more in common than she thought.*

Casting the following Roles:

**ALY REARDAN **Lead / Age 22-29 / Woman / PAID

*A struggling country singer from a lower-middle-class family. Wry sense of humor and an old-school work ethic. Tough and scrappy, she knows she’s got the talent, but she’s not sure how many more setbacks she can take. At least one. She loves her boyfriend, Colby, but he just doesn’t get it. Sometimes it feels like no one does.*

items.text:
**COLORADO SHORT FILM CASTING CALL!**

Shooting dates: 6-8 days in late July to early and mid-August. Weekends.

Location: Colorado front range, near Denver – specifics TBD

Genre: Drama, Coming of Age, Revolutionary War Era

A gentler masculinity is explored as young siblings play while the American revolutionary war whirls around them. 

Length: 12-14 minutes

Compensation: Paid project with meals, gas compensation, film festival recognition, IMDb credits, and high-quality demo reel footage provided.

Union or non-union. Looking for Colorado local actors!

*LEAD ROLES:*

**PAUL** 8-12 - Male, any race/ethnicity

The energetic, theatrical, youngest sibling who thinks he’s in charge. When his family was moved out into rural Pennsylvania by his father, he was distraught to find how quiet it was, much different from the New York carnivals and theatre shows he had grown up admiring. Quiet moments therefore must be filled by imaginative games. 

**MARGARET** 10-13 - Female, caucasian

The protective older sibling. Cool and calculating, hiding a deep rage inside. She’s searching for a reason for that rage to be justified -- and the war gives it to her. 

**CAPTAIN PAUL** early 20’s - Male, any race/ethnicity

The older version of Paul. deadly serious and reckless, he wants to join the local militia to fight the oppression of the monarchy. 

*SUPPORTING ROLES:*

**BENEDICT** 8-12 - Male, any race/ethnicity

Quiet, reserved, the drummer boy in the local militia.

**GENERAL BENEDICT** early 20’s - Male, any race/ethnicity

Confident, commanding, a bit of a tortured soul. 

**BERRY **40s-60s - Male, any race/ethnicity

A disheartened leader in the local militia. 

**FATHER **30-60, male, any race/ethnicity. Quaker farmer.

**MOTHER** 30-50, female, any race/ethnicity. Quaker farmer. 

PLEASE FILL OUT THIS FORM TO AUDITION: [[https://forms.gle/2k7PQoxBEyPNE4kWA](https://forms.gle/2k7PQoxBEyPNE4kWA)](https://forms.gle/2k7PQoxBEyPNE4kWA)

Happy self-taping!

Kjerstin Davies Darcy Orrok Lisa Counterman Jeanine Roybal Susanna Speier We apologize for the oversight! The mother sides will be available on the form by the end of the day.

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w czerwcu, w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet w różnym wieku do następujących ról:

1. Alicja Kępińska (22) –  elegancka asystentka. Zaradna i wyszczekana.

Data: 03. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto

2. Katarzyna Majewska (24) – Sprawia wrażenie niewinnej, ale to tylko poza którą umie wykorzystać na swoją korzyść. Ma wyzywające ubrania i krzykliwy makijaż. 

Data: 04. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto

3. Adela Kolska (30) – mama 2-letniego Jasia. Dobrze ubrana, zadbana, ale na twarzy widać ślady problemów alkoholowych. Miała problemy alkoholowe, po urodzeniu Jasia rozwiodła się z mężem. Teraz chce odzyskać opiekę nad synem. Jest zdeterminowana, kocha syna, choć do tej pory niespecjalnie to okazywała.

Daty: 01. i 05. czerwca
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

4. Matka 1 (30 - 35) – matka spędzająca czas z dzieckiem na placu zabaw. 

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 300 zł netto

5. Wiktoria Tylicz (33) – słabo wykształcona pracownica fizyczna, uzależniona od narkotyków. Jej praca jest zbyt nisko płatna, aby nabyć je w pożądanej ilości. Próbuje zdobyć pieniądze nielegalnie, ale ma wyrzuty sumienia.

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto

6. Jolanta Niewiadomska (35) - współlokatorka Wiktorii. Wie o jej uzależnieniu i jej się to bardzo nie podoba, trochę się boi, ale jednocześnie martwi się o koleżankę.

Data: 02. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto

7. Agnieszka Kozłowska (35) – kochanka Jerzego. Delikatna romantyczka ubrana w sukienkę w kwiaty. 

Data: 03. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto

8. Matylda Osuch (37) - porywaczka-amatorka. Prowadzi małą firmę, która popadła w poważne kłopoty, więc postanowiła się dorobić inną drogą. Myśli, że jest sprytna, choć jej działania przy porwaniu wyglądają dość amatorsko. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto

9. Wiktoria Jeziorowska (41) – żona Jerzego. Kobieta przywykła do luksusów, ale sama jest roztrzepana i niezbyt zaradna, a  przy tym emocjonalna i wybuchowa.

Data: 04. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto

10. Gospodyni – Lucyna Pazurska (47) – zaradna, żywiołowa i „z charakterem”. Utrzymuje porządek w domu Jerzego. Niezbyt się lubi z Wiktorią. 

Data: 04. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto

11.Urszula Kolska (65) babcia Jasia. Emerytka, która nieźle się trzyma, choć ma problem z nogą (lekko utyka przy większym wysiłku, łapią ją skurcze). Emocjonalna, ale potrafi zachować zimną głowę w trudnych sytuacjach.

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
**AUDITION NOTICE**

*The Tragicall Historie of Doctor Faustus* by Christopher Marlowe

Directed by Melanie White - Rough Magic Theatre

AUDITIONS:

Saturday June 13: 10am-3pm

Sunday, June 14: 10am-1pm 

Callbacks: Sunday, June 14 1pm-5pm

Pay: $250 stipend. 

Union and Non-Union performers welcome.

BIPOC performers are strongly encouraged to audition!

What is your soul worth? Craving unlimited knowledge and influence, John Faustus makes a literal deal with the devil: 24 years of magic and power in exchange for his mortal soul. At first, the bargain feels thrilling, but as time runs out, Faustus is forced to confront the true cost of his ambition. Darkly funny, provocative, and surprisingly modern, *Doctor Faustus* explores what happens when the cost of power is everything. 

*Doctor Faustus* will play at the Vancouver Fringe Festival, performing September 10-20, 2026 on Granville Island. Rehearsals will be in the evenings and weekends in July and August, 2-4 times a week. 

Please submit a headshot and resume to [roughmagictheatrevancouver@gmail.com](mailto:roughmagictheatrevancouver@gmail.com) and mention which role(s) you think you are right for.

We will contact you to set up an audition time. Please be prepared to read from sides (provided in advance) and to perform a 1-2 minute classical monologue of your choice.

CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

**FAUSTUS**: 20s-early 30s, any race, male-presenting. John Faustus is a brilliant but arrogant scholar who becomes dissatisfied with the limits of scholarly knowledge. Hungry for power, pleasure, and ultimate understanding, he makes a pact with the devil, trading his soul for magical abilities and worldly rewards. Although intelligent and ambitious, Faustus is deeply flawed by pride, insecurity, and an inability to repent.

**ENSEMBLE** (aka Everyone Else): **Three** roles, 20s-40s, any race, any gender. These three actors play a combined 30+ characters, so we are looking for versatile character actors who can create a distinct persona with just a few strokes. Strong physical and vocal transformation skills are essential. Experience with heightened text, clowning, comedy, and/or physical theatre is an asset.

Please note that the role of **MEPHISTOPHELES** has already been cast.

(Graphic design: Sidney Martin)

sharedPost.text:
Please share and keep your eyes open for Stew McLean who is a member of the Vancouver Film/TV community- a wonderful actor. 

RCMP is seeking public assistance in locating Stewart McLean who was reported missing on May 18, 2026.
Stewart McLean was last seen on May 15, 2026. Police are very concerned for Stewart’s health and well-being.

Description of Stewart McLean:
45 years 
5ft 10 in
150 lbs
Grey hair
Blue eyes
Anyone with information on the whereabouts of Stewart McLean is urged to contact their local police, or Crime Stoppers at 1-800-222-8477 (TIPS).

items.text:
# **NON-UNION CASTING CALL**

This commercial is for Ford and films in Calgary** all expenses paid.**

You must be available **June 15-22** for ALL DATES. If not available to travel to Calgary for these dates do no submit.

Auditions will be via self tape you do at home. Callbacks will be done via zoom. Must not be exclusively repped by a commercial agent to apply.

**Pay: **

$300 per travel day (2)

$300 per down day (day not working)

$600 per day on set 

$6000 buyout after commercial is edited and airing

Flights, 4-5* hotel and expenses covered.

IF local to calgary no hotel provided. 

**We are seeking:**

**Men:**
* Real Carpenters (30s-40s)
* Real farmers (30s-40s)
* Real boat builders (20s-40s)
* Real Industrial Builders (30s-50s)
* Real Older Farmer (60s-70s)
* Real Younger Farmer (young 20s)

**Women:**
* Real boat builders (20s-40s)

**If you are available and fit the specs abov**e please send to [lynda@gotalentagency.com](mailto:lynda@gotalentagency.com) ASAP:

1. First/Last name
2. Email
3. Phone
4. ONE good photo (head/shoulders) taken recently
5. Which category you fall into and a brief description of your experience

[www.gotalentagency.com](www.gotalentagency.com)

items.text:
Für einen Werbedreh werden 6 Statisten gesucht, gedreht wird am 26.05. in Stuttgart. Es wird ein Live-Event sein mit Bezug zur Weltmeisterschaft 2026. 

Gesucht werden Männer im alter von 20-40 Jahren, die einen Lieferfahrer spielen.
Gedreht wird von 11 - 22 Uhr. 

Bei interesse bitte auch direkt ein Foto mit schicken. 

Das ganze wird natürlich bezahlt! 

Liebe Grüße und bis bald

Gesucht werden Männer im alter von 20-40 Jahren, die einen Lieferfahrer spielen.

sharedPost.text:
✨ ¿Si tienes una marca de un producto ó servicio y quieres llevarla al siguiente nivel? ✨
En Rouge Pole & Dance estamos buscando marcas que quieran brillar junto a nosotros en nuestro Gran Showcase / Graduación de Junio 💃
Si ofreces ropa casual ó de cóktel, ropa deportiva, lencería, tacones, productos ó servicios, ¡ésta es tú oportunidad perfecta para conectar con nuestro público y aumentar tu visibilidad!
🎪 Forma parte de nuestro evento como expositor
🤝 Da a conocer tu marca
🌟 Vive una experiencia única llena de arte, talento y energía
📩 Contáctanos para más información y asegura tu espacio
¡Haz que tu marca destaque en el escenario! ✨

Want stronger material and a better chance to get booked?

Selfcast Exclusive is for talents who want to level up.

This program is created for talents who want:

• stronger photos
• a better intro video
• selftape guidance
• stronger profile material
• a better understanding of how the industry works
• to learn how to apply for roles the right way

This is not just a workshop.
It’s a chance to present yourself more professionally and stand stronger for future castings.

If you are serious about your next step, this is for you.

Apply in the Selfcast app.
https://selfcast.com/for-talents/

sharedPost.text:
„Was ist Wahrheit?“

Aus dieser Frage entsteht derzeit ein außergewöhnliches neues Musiktheaterwerk:

DIE LETZTEN STUNDEN

Ein Musikdrama in sieben Bildern über Jesus, Judas, Maria Magdalena und den Zerfall von Wahrheit, Erinnerung und Wirklichkeit.

Zwischen monumentalem Chor, orchestralen Klangflächen, modernen Popstimmen, Operngesang und elektronischen Elementen entsteht eine düstere, emotionale und kompromisslose Klangwelt.

Die Musik verbindet Einflüsse großer Musikdramen mit moderner Klangsprache: von sakraler Wucht bis zu zerbrechlicher Intimität,.von Dissonanz bis zu Stille.

Im Zentrum steht nicht nur die Passion, 
sondern der Mensch:

Zweifel
Verrat
Liebe
Macht
Erinnerung

Und die Frage, wie Wahrheit entsteht.

Das Werk wird nicht nur geschrieben —
sondern vollständig eigenständig komponiert.

Der Schluss:
Hammerschläge.
Ein zerfallender Chor.
Dissonanzen 
Dunkelheit.

Und eine letzte Frage,
die im Raum bleibt:

„Was ist Wahrheit?“

#DieLetztenStunden #Musiktheater #NeueOper #Oper #Musical #Soundtrack #Orchester #Klangkunst #Judas #Jesus #MariaMagdalena #Vellin

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon, "deinem Lieblingssender"

MOVIETIME KW 21/2026

STAR WAR FEELING UND INTERVIEW MIT EINER SCHAUSPIELIKONE 

Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu startet am 20. Mai 2026 in den Kinos. Das lang erwartete Science-Fiction-Abenteuer bringt das beliebte Duo erstmals vom Streamingdienst Disney+ auf die große Kinoleinwand. Es markiert die lang ersehnte Rückkehr von Star Wars in die Lichtspielhäuser.

Die Legende des Wüstenkindes (Originaltitel: L'Enfant Du Désert) ist ein französisches Kino-Abenteuer und Familiendrama von Regisseur Gilles de Maistre. Nun startet der Film und basiert auf historischen Nomaden-Überlieferungen aus Nordafrika.

Im letzten Sommer beendete er seine Schauspielkarriere, wir konnten mit der Ikone des deutschsprachigen Film, Sky Dumont, ein Interview über seine Laufbahn führen und Prof Mag Adolf Obendrauf erzählt uns was die Militärmusik NÖ mit dem Film verbindet.

Ergänzt wird das einstündige Magazin mit Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 20.5.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

Fotocredits: SMF, Disney Pictures

Calling all UK food & drink content creators (big or small) ✨

I’m currently looking to connect with warm, engaging UK-based food & drink creators for a really lovely paid commercial campaign with a leading oral care brand.

You might be a:

food creator, home cook, coffee/drinks creator, foodie personality, or lifestyle creator with a genuine love of food.

Importantly, you do not need a huge following — we’re much more interested in authentic people with an engaged audience and a natural presence on camera.

Experience of sensitive teeth or gums is essential.

Full details are on the flyer below — please email casting@casperblackcasting.com with your socials if interested.

items.text:
# **Looking for driven creators & creative entrepreneurs to join our roster.**

I'm a **Community Impact Producer** 
I connect community-driven businesses and social enterprises (brands with real missions, not just profit goals) to talented creators who can tell their stories.

**What I'm building:** A team of collaborators who create branded content and short films that showcase what we do best. This content becomes our leverage to land paid opportunities with businesses and brands who value our style, impact, and community connection. #COLLECTIVEEFFORT

**What I need from you:**
* Self-driven and passionate about your craft
* Ready to create NOW (no excuses, no delays)
* Interested in building a real career in the creative space
* Comfortable with an intensive, productive work pace

**What this isn't:**
* A casual hobby project
* A "maybe someday" opportunity

**If you're interested, speak up and be ready to go.** This is for people who want to build something real.

Comment your FOCUS and GOALS if interested.

topComments.text:
You should have your parent monitor anything you are posting in groups like this. These people aren't vetted. In LA to work with a minor they must have a CPS permit. 

If you are serious about this kind of work you need training and an agent. An agent or manager will act as a buffer to keep you safe in an industry that isn't safe.

Please do not meet or talk to strangers. It's already a red flag if they are talking to you without an adult.

I'm a youth performer advocate and the parent of a teen actor. 

The safest way to get into this work is to do some classes and get representation.

Hello. We would love to help with bookings.
angelznationbooking@gmail.com

items.text:
**Open Call — The New Symposium **

The New Symposium is launching new groups this weekend! It invites musicians, researchers, and artists working across music and related artistic disciplines 

—

Join one of **five ongoing groups** to take part in the** first in-person gathering at the 6th edition of Bled Contemporary Music Week in June**, where participants will exchange ideas and create together throughout the week in an open, collaborative format.

Participants form an interdisciplinary working group and develop their practice in dialogue with an international community. Weekly online exchanges, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and long-term peer learning create a dynamic space shaped by participants’ needs, enabling artistic growth and development.

**GROUPS and their orientation: **
* Friday I – Composition & Research based
* Friday II – Production & projects development
* Saturday I – Performance & Composition, emphasis on theoretical exploration 
* Saturday II – Interdisciplinary Group, Practice as the foundation for discussions
* Sunday I – Composition & Performance 

—

Participation fee: 100€ monthly 

Apply before May 25, to join the program and festival in June

items.text:
Auditions for Around the World in 80 Days at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente
AUDITIONS!

Around the World in 80 Days
Adapted by Mark Brown. From the novel by Jules Verne.
Directed by Frank Minano

Auditions:
Sunday, May 24 @ 6:00pm

Callbacks: by invitation Tuesday, June 2 @ 7:00pm

Synopsis:
Join fearless adventurer Phileas Fogg and his faithful manservant as they race to beat the clock! Phileas Fogg has agreed to an outrageous wager that puts his fortune and his life at risk. With his resourceful servant Passepartout, Fogg sets out to circle the globe in an unheard-of 80 days. But his every step is dogged by a detective who thinks he’s a robber on the run. Danger, romance, and comic surprises abound in this whirlwind of a show as 6 actors portraying 39 characters traverse seven continents in one of the great adventures of all time.

Please be prepared to read from sides provided
Bring a headshot and resume and be ready to list ALL conflicts.
Cold reading sides will also be provided at auditions.
Performances: August 21 to September 13, 2026

Thurs–Sat at 7:30pm
Sundays at 2:00pm

Saturday matinees August 29 and September 12 at 2:00pm
Rehearsals at Cabrillo Playhouse

@7pm
June 9,16, 23, 30
July 7, 9, 21, 22, 28, 29
Aug 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 13
Tech 16-20

*Final week of rehearsal call time is 6:30pm*

We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.
There is a $100 stipend offered

The play blends Victorian adventure with Monty Python–style farce. Characters are richly drawn but heightened for theatricality—committed, playful, and self-aware. Timing, transformation, and ensemble cohesion are key

All audition information can be found at: [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/)

Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

BOB
White male, mid-50s to early 70s. 
A longtime husband who has grown distant and emotionally inattentive in his marriage. Set in his ways, distracted, and unaware of the emotional disconnect around him. Dry realism and subtle emotional depth are important for the role.

Filming: September
Location: Los Angeles
Compensation: Paid, credit, meals 

Non union

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM**

We are casting for an upcoming short film rooted in Oakland culture, family, identity, and community. Seeking actors who can bring authenticity, emotional depth, and strong presence to the following roles. Looking to film in the Bay Area in September. Experience preferred, but not required.

If Interested, please e-mail acting resume with portfolio to [gellipascualmedia@gmail.com](mailto:gellipascualmedia@gmail.com) with the Subject Line entitled “JORDAN SHORT - CASTING SUBMISSION – [Role Name] – [Actor Name]”

**JORDAN**

**Age Range:** 19–20
**Ethnicity:** African American / Biracial
**Height:** 5’7”–6’3
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan is stylish, confident, and naturally charismatic. He carries the pride, depth, and culture of Oakland in a way that feels effortless and real. His style is intentional and expressive — cool without trying too hard. Hair can be locs, braids, or a curly fro. Jordan has quiet strength, emotional depth, and is still growing into who he is. We are looking for someone grounded, layered, and authentic.

**JOVAN**

**Age Range:** 19–23
**Ethnicity:** Filipino American
**Height:** 5’7”–6’4”
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jovan is fashionable, charismatic, and full of personality. He has a bold, unapologetic look , possibly a low fade, rat tail, or a distinct personal style that stands out. On the surface, he is funny, playful, and magnetic, but underneath is someone intelligent, observant, and mysterious. He notices more than he says and keeps people guessing.

**MARIE **

**Age Range:** 40–50
**Ethnicity:** Filipino
**Language: **Must be fluent in Tagalog
**Background:** From the Philippines

Marie is a strong, smart, and resilient Filipino woman with lived experience. She carries authority naturally and has a presence that commands respect. She is tough but loving, direct but caring. Marie is grounded, practical, emotionally intelligent, and unafraid to speak the truth.  

**GRANDPA / JOVAN’S GRANDFATHER**

**Age Range:** 60–80
**Ethnicity:** Filipino
**Language: **Must be fluent in Tagalog
**Background:** From the Philippines

Grandpa is a quiet, observant Filipino elder whose presence says more than words. He may not speak often, but when he does, it matters. Looking for someone who can bring stillness, dignity, and emotional weight to the role.

**PROFESSOR AUGUSTINE**

**Age Range:** 30–40
**Ethnicity:** Caucasian
**Height:** 6’0”–6’3”
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Professor Augustine is intelligent, grounded, and intentional. He understands Oakland, its culture, and its community. He serves as a mentor figure,supportive, but not afraid to challenge his students to think deeper and grow. We are looking for someone who can bring warmth, intellect, and a strong mentor-like presence.

**MYLO**

**Age Range:** 13
**Ethnicity:** Latino
**Height:** Short for his age

Mylo is a sharp, observant young teen with big energy. He is curious, impressionable, and figuring out who he wants to become. He looks up to the older boys and absorbs everything happening around him. There is innocence in him, but also a toughness shaped by his environment. Mylo represents youth, potential, and the crossroads between childhood and the streets.

**JORDAN’S MOTHER**

**Age Range:** Late 40s–Mid 50s
**Ethnicity:** White
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan’s mother is strong, grounded, and emotionally aware. She understands Oakland and the complexities of the world her son is navigating. She is protective, loving, and firm. While she may not always fully understand Jordan’s choices or environment, her love for him is deep. She wants him to be accountable, focused, and safe.

**JORDAN’S FATHER**

**Age Range:** 40s–50s
**Ethnicity:** African American
**Occupation:** Truck Driver
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan’s father is hardworking, disciplined, and practical. As a truck driver, he has spent years on the road providing for his family. He may not be overly expressive, but his love shows through action, sacrifice, and responsibility. He believes in structure, accountability, and hard work. We are looking for someone who can bring strength, realism, and quiet emotional depth.
items.summary:
**CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM**

We are casting for an upcoming short film rooted in Oakland culture, family, identity, and community. Seeking actors who can bring authenticity, emotional depth, and strong presence to the following roles. Looking to film in the Bay Area in September. Experience preferred, but not required.

If Interested, please e-mail acting resume with portfolio to [gellipascualmedia@gmail.com](mailto:gellipascualmedia@gmail.com) with the Subject Line entitled “JORDAN SHORT - CASTING SUBMISSION – [Role Name] – [Actor Name]”

**JORDAN**

**Age Range:** 19–20
**Ethnicity:** African American / Biracial
**Height:** 5’7”–6’3
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan is stylish, confident, and naturally charismatic. He carries the pride, depth, and culture of Oakland in a way that feels effortless and real. His style is intentional and expressive — cool without trying too hard. Hair can be locs, braids, or a curly fro. Jordan has quiet strength, emotional depth, and is still growing into who he is. We are looking for someone grounded, layered, and authentic.

**JOVAN**

**Age Range:** 19–23
**Ethnicity:** Filipino American
**Height:** 5’7”–6’4”
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jovan is fashionable, charismatic, and full of personality. He has a bold, unapologetic look , possibly a low fade, rat tail, or a distinct personal style that stands out. On the surface, he is funny, playful, and magnetic, but underneath is someone intelligent, observant, and mysterious. He notices more than he says and keeps people guessing.

Castingly - Spotlight
Hi Everyone! 

Daniel from Castingly here, I’m putting together a series of spotlight features for our social channels and would love to showcase you!

If you want to be considered: 

Send me your Castingly public profile page — must be live to qualify. 

Email me the profile link at daniel@castingly.com with SUBJECT: Spotlight — I'll need your bio and a short filmed monologue you'd want showcased. 

If you don’t have a profile but would like to join, use this special offer: Get one year FREE with code ACTOR-2026. Sign up at [www.castingly.com](https://www.castingly.com/) — no payment required.

Update on Castingly: We just hit ~2,000 members and have nationwide casting breakdowns LIVE. Casting directors and production companies are already signing up.

Follow for tips & updates: Instagram @castinglyHQ and Facebook @CastinglyFeel free to reach out with any questions! Reply here or DM me — happy to help you set up your profile fast.

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w czerwcu, w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn w różnym wieku do następujących ról:

1. Szymon Jeziorowski (23) – Manipulant, chciwy i chytry, ale gra dobrego gościa.

Data: 03. i 04. czerwca
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

2. Narkoman 1 (30) - narkoman. Brudny i zaniedbany. 

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Norbert Kolski (32) – ojciec 2-letniego Jasia. Samotnie wychowuje syna, odkąd rozstał się z żoną, przez jej problemy alkoholowe. Jest troskliwym (momentami nadmiernie) i dobrym ojcem. W relacjach z żoną jednak łatwo wpada w złość. Pracownik korpo.

Daty: 01. i 05. czerwca
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

4. Adrian Kowalski (34) – napakowany dresiarz, twarz kryminalisty. 

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto

5. Radosław Zacharski (39) – informator policji z poznańskiego ABN.

Data: 03. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto

6. Informator (41) – typ spod ciemnej gwiazdy. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 03. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Konrad Potępa (42) –  elegancki wspólnik Jerzego. Impulsywny i wybuchowy. Najpierw powie, potem pomyśli.

Data: 03. i 04. czerwca
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

8. Jerzy Jeziorowski (45) – typ pewnego siebie, twardego faceta, skupionego na pracy. W scenariuszu jest ubrany w strój sportowy do biegania.  

Data: 03. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto

9. Adam Sapliński (49) – prawnik Adeli. Elegancki, rzeczowy adwokat.

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 300 zł netto

10.Taksówkarz (40-60)  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
I’m a Film Director. And I shoot portraits -
this month I'm opening my book to build out my Berlin portfolio – check the details below

For: actors, models, musicians, designers, freelancers, anyone in the Berlin creative world who needs strong images of themselves and is tired of looking like another LinkedIn headshot.

The offer: 

— Portraits, Polaroids and Snaps — delivered next day 

— Simple session €80 (outdoor, 30 minutes, 10-12 images)

— Studio session €140 (studio in Kreuzberg, 1 hour, 20-30 images, retouch included)

— Full personal and professional usage

Standard session details above. For longer shoots, concept work, or specific creative direction, just say so in your message and we’ll quote separately.

I shoot the way I direct. I'll come in knowing who you are, I'll watch how you move, and we'll find what's actually in your face. 

Four slots left in May. DM me to book one.

items.text:
Liebe Caster, liebe Booker, liebe Produktionsteams, 

wenn Ihr bei kurzfristigen Besetzungen kein Blut sehen könnt, dann könnt Ihr genau dafür mich buchen. 

Ich bin Christian Weiße aus Köln, Darsteller, Komparse, Kleindarsteller, Content Creator und Filmproduzent mit viel Praxis vor und hinter der Kamera. Ich kenne Setabläufe, verstehe Disposition, Regie, Timing, Anschluss, Geduld, Wiederholungen, kurzfristige Änderungen und die Realität am Drehtag. Genau deshalb bin ich nicht nur ein weiterer Name in einer Liste, sondern eine verlässliche Lösung, wenn eine Besetzung sauber, glaubwürdig und ohne zusätzliche Reibung funktionieren muss. 

Ich bin kurzfristig verfügbar, komme aus Köln und bin je nach Projekt auch überregional organisierbar. Auf Wunsch auch gemeinsam mit Sandra Wötzel als eingespielte Duo-Option: einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Darsteller gewinnen. 

Referenzen vor der Kamera, Kurzform: 

Film / Kino: Identitti, About us / Afterglow, DIE JAHRE MIT DIR, Embrace The Switch 

TV / Serien / Streaming: Alles was zählt, Unter Uns, Soko Köln, Die Landarztpraxis, Die Füchsin, Köln 50667, Frier & 50 - Am Ende meiner Tage, Die Falle, Plötzlich Schwester, The Comeback, Tatort - Maskerade, Tatort - Die guten Leute, Mein bester Freund, seine Freundin und ich, Wäldern - Staffel 3, Husk, Merz gegen Merz, So hell die Nacht, Die Zweiflers, Doitscha, Perfekt zusammen?!, Embassy, Der Blaulicht Report, Auf Streife, Notruf 

Show / Doku / Factual / Magazin: ZDF heute Show, RTL extra - Der Kaffeereport, Das Motzmobil, Ich bin ein Star - das Nachspiel, Local Hero Bingo, Terra Xplore - Thema Trennung, Die Pumuckl Show, Grill den Henssler 

Gericht / Scripted Reality: Barbara Salesch - Das Strafgericht, Ulrich Wetzel - Das Strafgericht 

Werbung / Web / Eigenproduktion: Edle Tropfen, über 1000 eigene Image-, Event-, Doku- und Filmproduktionen 

Meine Daten in Kurzform: 

Christian Weiße 
Spielalter: 35-50 
Wohnort: Köln 
Größe: 175 cm 
Gewicht: 75 kg 
Konfektion: 48 
Schuhgröße: 41 
Augen: blau-grün 
Haare: dunkelblond, kurz 
Brille: Brillenträger, ohne Brille spielbar 
Führerschein: B, BE, AM 
Kontakt: 017661015160 
E-Mail: christian.weisse.talent@gmail.com 
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/christianweissedigicontent/

items.summary:
Liebe Caster, liebe Booker, liebe Produktionsteams, 

wenn Ihr bei kurzfristigen Besetzungen kein Blut sehen könnt, dann könnt Ihr genau dafür mich buchen. 

Ich bin Christian Weiße aus Köln, Darsteller, Komparse, Kleindarsteller, Content Creator und Filmproduzent mit viel Praxis vor und hinter der Kamera. Ich kenne Setabläufe, verstehe Disposition, Regie, Timing, Anschluss, Geduld, Wiederholungen, kurzfristige Änderungen und die Realität am Drehtag. Genau deshalb bin ich nicht nur ein weiterer Name in einer Liste, sondern eine verlässliche Lösung, wenn eine Besetzung sauber, glaubwürdig und ohne zusätzliche Reibung funktionieren muss. 

Ich bin kurzfristig verfügbar, komme aus Köln und bin je nach Projekt auch überregional organisierbar. Auf Wunsch auch gemeinsam mit Sandra Wötzel als eingespielte Duo-Option: einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Darsteller gewinnen. 

Referenzen vor der Kamera, Kurzform: 

Film / Kino: Identitti, About us / Afterglow, DIE JAHRE MIT DIR, Embrace The Switch 

TV / Serien / Streaming: Alles was zählt, Unter Uns, Soko Köln, Die Landarztpraxis, Die Füchsin, Köln 50667, Frier & 50 - Am Ende meiner Tage, Die Falle, Plötzlich Schwester, The Comeback, Tatort - Maskerade, Tatort - Die guten Leute, Mein bester Freund, seine Freundin und ich, Wäldern - Staffel 3, Husk, Merz gegen Merz, So hell die Nacht, Die Zweiflers, Doitscha, Perfekt zusammen?!, Embassy, Der Blaulicht Report, Auf Streife, Notruf 

Show / Doku / Factual / Magazin: ZDF heute Show, RTL extra - Der Kaffeereport, Das Motzmobil, Ich bin ein Star - das Nachspiel, Local Hero Bingo, Terra Xplore - Thema Trennung, Die Pumuckl Show, Grill den Henssler 

Gericht / Scripted Reality: Barbara Salesch - Das Strafgericht, Ulrich Wetzel - Das Strafgericht 

Werbung / Web / Eigenproduktion: Edle Tropfen, über 1000 eigene Image-, Event-, Doku- und Filmproduktionen 

Meine Daten in Kurzform: 

Christian Weiße 
Spielalter: 35-50 
Wohnort: Köln 
Größe: 175 cm 
Gewicht: 75 kg 
Konfektion: 48 
Schuhgröße: 41 
Augen: blau-grün 
Haare: dunkelblond, kurz 
Brille: Brillenträger, ohne Brille spielbar 
Führerschein: B, BE, AM 
Kontakt: 017661015160 
E-Mail: christian.weisse.talent@gmail.com 
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/christianweissedigicontent/ 

Wenn Ihr also eine Besetzung sucht, die sichtbar passt, seterfahren arbeitet, zuverlässig erscheint und am Drehtag eher entlastet als erklärt werden muss, dann denkt gern an mich. 

Ich bin bereit, Euer Projekt mit Professionalität, Timing und Herz zu unterstützen und stimme der Datenspeicherung zu. 

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion

items.text:
📣  We need a Company Production Manager!

👀Someone to keep an eye on everything so we can keep our eyes on the show.

The role covers a bit of everything:
📝 Production admin and correspondence
🎭 Rehearsal logistics
📱 Social media support and filming reels
🔍 Research, mailouts, general keeping-us-on-track

You'd work closely with both of us — Creative Director and Executive Producer — across the full production period.

The vision is ours. 
🧠 The organised brain keeping it all together could be yours!

We're Dark Theatre Rochdale. 
Debut show. 
UK Amateur Premiere of Hamill's Dracula. 
Halloween. 
Rochdale.

Voluntary. Flexible. Fully credited as Company Manager.
DM us or email 

...what could go wrong.

sharedPost.text:
🔊 Volunteer Role: Company Manager  

Dark Theatre Rochdale | Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really | October 2026

We're looking for a volunteer Company Manager to work closely alongside Ange, the Creative Director, and Lise, the Executive Producer,  across the full production period. 

Your job is simple in theory and invaluable in practice — keep us organised, keep things moving, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.

What the role covers:

 *Production Support* 
📝 General administrative support to both directors
Maintaining records, documents and schedules throughout the production period.
☎️ Research tasks; sourcing quotes, suppliers, information as needed.
Targeted mailouts and correspondence as required for crew volunteers, marketing, and ticket sales.
🗓️ Supporting the rehearsal process

 *Social Media* 
Supporting the scheduling and posting across all social media pages.
🎬Filming (scripted and unscripted) reels during rehearsals to use for post content.
Contributing to supplementary content where needed.
All content is sense-checked before posting.

 *General* 
👀 Keeping an overview of scheduled tasks, maintaining deadlines, and flagging any problems.
Being a reliable, organised presence across a busy production period.

 *What we're looking for:* 
Organised, reliable and proactive.
Good written communication.
Comfortable with Instagram, TikTok and Facebook.
Happy picking up a phone and filming when needed.
Someone who gets satisfaction from keeping things running smoothly 

 *What you'll get:* 
✔️ Company Manager credit on all production materials.
✔️ An inside view of a UK Amateur Premiere from the ground up.
✔️ Varied, genuinely interesting work across a full production cycle.
✔️ A close working relationship with a small, committed creative team.

 *Time commitment : Flexible*  
Builds naturally through the production period. Some tasks are time-sensitive — particularly around casting announcements, ticket launch, and rehearsals from July.

 *To express interest:*
✉️ Email DarkTheatreDale@proton.me 
with a bit about yourself and what draws you to this role.

sharedPost.text:
Beyond The Fray!
And so it begins......  Alternate Shadows, in collaboration with Attacked by a Wok Films, proudly presents **Beyond the Fray** - a joyful, uproarious celebration of Matthew Fray’s brilliantly original comedy, brought to life on stage and screen.

 

Matthew Fray, a gifted comedy writer from the Medway Towns, left an enduring legacy with credits on ITV’s *The Sketch Show*, Channel 4’s *Smack the Pony*, BBC1’s *TV To Go*, and Radio 2’s *The Griff Rhys Jones Show*. His stage work - *The Men’s Group*, *Out to Lunch*, *The Seventh Day* *and his final play Just Business *- showcased his sharp wit and keen sense of humour.

 

A treasure trove of Matthew’s classic and some never-before-seen sketches will be performed at Medway Little Theatre, Rochester on 

**Sat 1st August - 7.30pm **with all monies raised from this event being donated to **AMMF - the Cholangiocarcinoma Charity** **raising awareness of and funds for research into this type of cancer.**

**Book your seat via Ticketsource for this one night only performance. **

[https://www.ticketsource.com/mlt](https://www.ticketsource.com/mlt)

items.groupTitle: Casting For Artists&Dancers Travel All Over The World
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Last night was more than just a performance it was passion, energy, and magic all coming alive under the spotlight. Every light, every beat, every moment on that stage reminded us why we love what we do. Thank you to everyone who cheered, supported, and made the night unforgettable.❤️🔥✨

#urbancrew #flyersofthesouth #performingartist #InternationalPerformers #reels

items.text:
Liebe Caster, liebe Booker, liebe Produktionsteams, 

wenn Ihr bei kurzfristigen Besetzungen kein Blut sehen könnt, dann könnt Ihr genau dafür mich buchen. 

Ich bin Christian Weiße aus Köln, Darsteller, Komparse, Kleindarsteller, Content Creator und Filmproduzent mit viel Praxis vor und hinter der Kamera. Ich kenne Setabläufe, verstehe Disposition, Regie, Timing, Anschluss, Geduld, Wiederholungen, kurzfristige Änderungen und die Realität am Drehtag. Genau deshalb bin ich nicht nur ein weiterer Name in einer Liste, sondern eine verlässliche Lösung, wenn eine Besetzung sauber, glaubwürdig und ohne zusätzliche Reibung funktionieren muss. 

Ich bin kurzfristig verfügbar, komme aus Köln und bin je nach Projekt auch überregional organisierbar. Auf Wunsch auch gemeinsam mit Sandra Wötzel als eingespielte Duo-Option: einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Darsteller gewinnen. 

Referenzen vor der Kamera, Kurzform: 

Film / Kino: Identitti, About us / Afterglow, DIE JAHRE MIT DIR, Embrace The Switch 

TV / Serien / Streaming: Alles was zählt, Unter Uns, Soko Köln, Die Landarztpraxis, Die Füchsin, Köln 50667, Frier & 50 - Am Ende meiner Tage, Die Falle, Plötzlich Schwester, The Comeback, Tatort - Maskerade, Tatort - Die guten Leute, Mein bester Freund, seine Freundin und ich, Wäldern - Staffel 3, Husk, Merz gegen Merz, So hell die Nacht, Die Zweiflers, Doitscha, Perfekt zusammen?!, Embassy, Der Blaulicht Report, Auf Streife, Notruf 

Show / Doku / Factual / Magazin: ZDF heute Show, RTL extra - Der Kaffeereport, Das Motzmobil, Ich bin ein Star - das Nachspiel, Local Hero Bingo, Terra Xplore - Thema Trennung, Die Pumuckl Show, Grill den Henssler 

Gericht / Scripted Reality: Barbara Salesch - Das Strafgericht, Ulrich Wetzel - Das Strafgericht 

Werbung / Web / Eigenproduktion: Edle Tropfen, über 1000 eigene Image-, Event-, Doku- und Filmproduktionen 

Meine Daten in Kurzform: 

Christian Weiße 
Spielalter: 35-50 
Wohnort: Köln 
Größe: 175 cm 
Gewicht: 75 kg 
Konfektion: 48 
Schuhgröße: 41 
Augen: blau-grün 
Haare: dunkelblond, kurz 
Brille: Brillenträger, ohne Brille spielbar 
Führerschein: B, BE, AM 
Kontakt: 017661015160 
E-Mail: christian.weisse.talent@gmail.com 
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/christianweissedigicontent/ 

Wenn Ihr also eine Besetzung sucht, die sichtbar passt, seterfahren arbeitet, zuverlässig erscheint und am Drehtag eher entlastet als erklärt werden muss, dann denkt gern an mich. 

Ich bin bereit, Euer Projekt mit Professionalität, Timing und Herz zu unterstützen und stimme der Datenspeicherung zu. 

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion

items.text:
Hey everyone,
my name is Kai and I’m currently based in London.

I’ve been consistently training in acting and already have experience in front of the camera through modeling, as well as being involved in a few independent short film and creative projects.

Working on camera and being part of creative productions is something I genuinely enjoy, so I’m open to all kinds of opportunities — short films, music videos, student productions, commercials, fashion/editorial shoots and other creative projects. 🙌🏻

Languages: English & German  
Height: 178 cm  
Available for castings & self tapes 🙂

007 CASTING AGENCY

Where Talent Meets Opportunity

EXCLUSIVE CASTING CALL — SOUTH AFRICAN COMMERCIAL CAMPAIGN

007 Casting Agency is currently seeking authentic South African talent for an upcoming premium TV commercial campaign filming in Sri Lanka for the South African market.

 MOM ROLE

We are seeking a Black South African woman who feels warm, grounded, natural, and genuinely relatable.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 30–35

• Medium-to-deep brown skin tone

• Natural 4B/4C hair or authentic cultural styling

• Healthy natural skin texture

• Warm smile and expressive eyes

• Soft, approachable features

• Genuine maternal energy

• Contemporary suburban South African presence

• No overly glamorous, editorial, or fashion-model aesthetics

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PINK LADY ROLE

We are seeking someone energetic, humorous, charismatic, and naturally confident.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 20–30

• Medium-to-deep brown complexion

• Authentic Black South African features

• Natural textured African hair

• Athletic and physically active

• Relatable, vibrant presence rather than high-fashion or editorial

📍 IMPORTANT INFORMATION

Shoot Location: Sri Lanka
Tentative Shoot Dates: 12th–15th June 2026
Shoot Duration: 1 day
Usage: 2-year buyout for the South African market

All applicants must have a valid passport.

Talent Budget:
Up to R37,000

Final rates and contractual terms will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.

Production Covers:

- Return flights

- Hotel accommodation

- Per diem

📩 SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS

Please submit the following:

Updated comp card (including name, age, and contact details)

Professional studio headshot

Medium shot

Full-length photographs

Introduction video filmed in landscape mode

Submit via WhatsApp/Email
0692215294
info.007casting@gmail.com

Submission Deadline:
20th May 2026

Serious applicants only.

007 Casting Agency reserves the right to shortlist suitable candidates before client presentation.

items.text:
Posting for a friend! Please do not DM me, I won't likely see it.

**Casting Call - San Jose** (Student Film)

Looking for an actor for a scene/skit this week. Flexible on day but looking for someone for 1.5-2hrs between 11am and 2pm near Japantown in San Jose. Open to any ethnicity, age (18+) and experience. 

This is for a school project so unpaid but will grab you a coffee and provide the edited copy in a month or less.

About the short film:
In a city park, a man’s seemingly harmless morning routine with his squirrel-chasing dog turns into a moral reckoning when a stranger calls his attention to the visible fear of the little mammals.

Casting for:
PARKGOER - an active member of the community who prides themselves on being respectful and ethical. A believer of "see something, say something", is never afraid to be the bold one to stick out in the crowd for what's right. Grew up with pets and is an animal lover.

This is best suited for someone who is looking to collaborate, add to their reel/experience or just want to get involved in a fun, little shoot! Copy & credit

If interested, please email  zakbyrd@campjupiter.com with your reel and headshots (if available). Thank you so much!

This is best suited for someone who is looking to collaborate, add to their reel/experience or just want to get involved in a fun, little shoot! Copy & credit

If interested, please email  zakbyrd@campjupiter.com with your reel and headshots (if available). Thank you so much!

a live reading

1944 Riverside Drive 

The lives of three Indian American sibling roommates are dismantled when their newly single mother decides to move in.

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – EPIZODY AKTORSKIE DZIECIĘCE**

 

Do filmu fabularnego poszukuję **DZIEWCZYNKI 7-10 lat** oraz **CHŁOPCA 9-12 lat.**

 

Dzieci grają głównych bohaterów z czasów dzieciństwa. Jest to jedna scena, ale z dialogiem więc szukam dzieci z doświadczeniem przed kamerą.

 

**DZIEWCZYNKA 7-10 lat - **brunetka lub szatynka z jasnymi oczami — niebieskimi lub szaro-niebieskimi, ciemne oczy odpadają. Mile widziane piegi. **W scenie dziewczynka tańczy balet nad jeziorem** więc super byłoby, gdyby tańczyła lub potrafiła wykonać proste figury taneczne. 

 

**CHŁOPIEC 9-12 lat - **Blondyn lub ciemny blondyn z niebieskimi oczami. Typ łobuziaka. Ważne, aby potrafił jeździć na rowerze.

 

Casting będzie dwuetapowy:

1.     selekcja na podstawie nadesłanych materiałów,

2.     zaproszenie wybranych dzieci na casting do studia w Warszawie 2 lub 3 czerwca

Będę wdzięczna za przesłanie propozycji do **czwartku, 21.05, do godz. 10:00.**

Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć wizytówkę jako link do You Tube oraz krótki opis doświadczenia przed kamerą i informację odnośnie dziewczynki czy tańczy i jaki rodzaj tańca, i chłopca czy jeździ na rowerze.

Proszę nie podawać doświadczenia w reklamach ani statystowania.

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **OR**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost**

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

**WARSZAWA**

**film fabularny – GŁÓWNA ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

Do filmu fabularnego poszukuję **DZIEWCZYNKI 9-11 lat uprawiającej piłkę nożną / sporty walki / jazdę na motocrossie. **

Poszukuję dziewczynki odważnej, pyskatej, ale też wrażliwej. Bohaterka jest sprytna, pomysłowa, zabawna, co obserwujemy od pierwszych scen filmu. Jest odważna, ale bywa też niebezpieczna.

🎬 SZUKAMY STATYSTÓW (+16-99) DO TELEDYSKU — KRAKÓW, 25 MAJA

TY. Tak, dokładnie Ty.

Nie ma żadnych wymagań. Przyjdź, jak chcesz, w czym chcesz — w garniturze, dresie, kostiumie, cokolwiek. Twoja jedyna rola? Stać w kolejce. Serio, to wszystko.

Każdy jest tu idealny. Szukamy ludzi, nie typów — Polacy, obcokrajowcy, wszyscy mile widziani.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💵 40 zł gotówką na miejscu

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**CASTING CALL – PAID, NON-UNION BRAND VIDEO**

Novel Productions is casting **two roles** for a small **30-second Brand Video**

**Shoot Location:** Vancouver, BC

**Shoot Date:** May 18, 2026 (4 hours)

**Compensation:** Flat rate of $250

**ROLES:**

• **Business Owner** — Age **25–40** | Male, ethnicity open

• **Marketing Director** — Age **25–40** | Male, ethnicity open

**SUBMISSIONS:**

Please send **headshot, acting resume, and reel (if available)** to: **casting@novelproductions.ca**

**Subject line:**

*Novel Casting - Role Name - Your Name*

This is a non-union flat-rate project intended for digital usage.

Selected submissions will be contacted with sides and instructions for self-tape auditions.

We encourage submissions from actors of all backgrounds.

items.text:
Casting Call for non-speaking product video
I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for: 1 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age late 20's, 30's or 40's.

Attached are some refence photos of talent appearances (and her notes) that our client likes. Any male is welcome to apply as all submissions will be reviewed and forwarded to the client for final selection.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face with a razor on camera. 

Location: TBD - either White Rock or New West 

Date: TBD - sometime before the end of May. We will work with your schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 for approximately 3 hours.

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

Subject line: “shaving casting”

items.text:
**CASTING CALL (Vancouver) — WICKEDWOLF MEDIA**

Short comedic project filming in the next 2–3 weeks. Shoot will last approximately 2.5 hours. Compensation: $150 flat per role. Non-union.

Seeking 5–6 high-energy, native English-speaking performers (M/F), ages 18–45. Local applicants only. Shoot date will be finalized after cast selection based on availability; ideally an afternoon shoot.

Role: Performers will portray a group of friends playing an indie adult party game — loud, varied, and highly expressive laughter, plus improvised comments and reactions. This is fast, funny, and irreverent.

To apply: Please message here OR email a recent photo and brief bio or resume link to michael@wickedwolf.media. Please include your city and phone number.

Submission deadline: May 22, 5pm.

topComments.text: Michael, could you provide a shoot location and date?
Do I need to be a Caucasian to apply?

items.text:
🎥 TWO-MINUTE TUESDAY 🎥  
   🎬 Talent Drop Tuesday  🎬

You met the stars. Now meet the TALENT.  

Post a 2-minute-or-less clip:  
- Monologue you love  
- Song snippet  
- Self-tape you’re proud of  
- Hidden skill: accents, instruments, stunts, puppetry — word is casted too
- Even a BTS from class/rehearsal  
-a video do your talent
- No video? Drop your best action shot + tell us the story behind it.

It doesn’t have to be perfect. It has to be YOU.  

RULES: 
No apologies. No “this is bad but…” Energy only.  
Just post it in the comments and go for it. Casting directors scroll. Let’s give them something to stop for.

sharedPost.text:
✨ CASTING CALL ✨
📍 Colorado Springs, Denver & surrounding areas

Due to an overwhelming increase in bookings — including frequent double and triple bookings — Once Upon A Dream is currently looking to expand our dream team of professional character performers!

As our cast continues to grow, we are actively working toward expanding authentic and diverse representation within these roles and are especially seeking performers of color for our Huntrix casting needs. Performers of Asian descent especially are strongly encouraged to apply!

Roles Needed: Rumi, Mira, Zoey, and all Saja boys.

What We’re Looking For:

✨ Comfortable performing in character and interacting with kids
✨ Great with children (experience with special needs children is a HUGE bonus!)
✨Acting skills (singing is a plus, but not required)
✨Flexible weekend availability
✨Reliable, enthusiastic, and passionate about creating magical memories

No professional training required — just heart, commitment, and a love for bringing stories to life. Training and costumes will be provided. 

💌 Interested in joining the magic?

• DM us via any of our social media platforms
• Text (719) 246-7591, or
• Email onceuponadream.co@outlook.com 

#coloradosprings #performers #theaterlife #characterperformers #castingcall

items.text:
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld.
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT

The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging

- Family dynamics & generational conflict

- Love, relationships & marriage

- Crime & survival in urban environments

- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects

- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.

The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. Preferably London based. We already have tons of applicants who have applied from other parts of the UK. We are now focused on 'London' applications.

Age Range: Open to all age groups

Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:

Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements

upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued

with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.

❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:

Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing

Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. We Highly advice to follow these simple rules because we are busy organising the project. 

E-Mail Applications to: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

URBAN DRAMA-THRILLER EXPLORING THE BRITISH SOUTH ASIAN COMMUNITY WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR: BRITISH SOUTH ASIAN (DESI) TALENT UK BORN RAISED AGES 8+ EXPERIENCED OR NEW ACTORS AUDITIONS FILMING LONDON OTHER LOCATIONS REHEARSALSI NORTH LONDON COMPENSATION •INDUSTRY STANDARD RATES CONTRACTS ISSUED PON FU FULL PRODUCT TION DRAMA CRIME CULTURE TABOO READ CAREFULLY SERIOUSAPPLICANTSON SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY TRAINING CHARACTER DEVELOPMENT MAJOR STREAMING TV NETWORKS'

📸 Suche Fotografen & Videografen! Offen für alle Arten von Shootings 🎥
Hi! Ich bin auf der Suche nach Kooperationen und offen für absolut jedes Format: Foto, Video, kreative Projekte oder kommerzielle Werbedrehs.

Kurz vorab: Ich bin kein Runway-Model mit Modelmaßen. Ich bin eine ganz normale Frau mit einem natürlichen Look, aber super motiviert, mich in verschiedensten Stilen auszuprobieren и neue Looks umzusetzen.

Ich bin zeitlich extrem flexibel, fast immer verfügbar und spontan einsatzbereit. Wenn ihr ein Gesicht für euer Projekt sucht oder kurzfristig jemanden vor der Kamera braucht — schreibt mir einfach, ich bin für jeden Spaß zu haben!

📍 Location: Berlin (und Umgebung).

📩 Schreibt mir gerne eine private Nachricht, ich freue mich auf eure Ideen!

items.text:
Hello everyone,

I’m currently looking for non-union film opportunities involving camera operation in the Colorado Springs and El Paso County area. I’m interested in both volunteer and paid projects as I work to gain more experience and get involved with the local filmmaking community along the Front Range.

I currently own a Canon DSLR camera from 2015, and it still works well. I’m open to indie films, student productions, short films, test shoots, and other local projects. My expected rate is flexible, generally around $250–$500, depending on the project.

I don’t have professional headshots yet, but I can provide photos taken at home if needed.

If anyone knows of productions looking for extra crew help, camera operators, or someone eager to learn and gain experience, please feel free to reach out or send me information about upcoming projects.

Thank you.

topComments.text: As a photographer for actors headshots and a filmmaker, I can bring both to fruition for you. I'm also a springs photographer But no one takes me serios. I have over 20 year with the PBR and Pikes peak international raceway. I have photographed legendary actors as well as local and Hollywood actors.

items.text:
NEW CASTING: 

We are casting for a still shoot taking place on June 6th in south Denver. Pay is $500/person and you would be needed for approximately 3 hours. This is for a housing division and usage is in perpetuity. If you have an agent, please be sure they are ok with this before you submit. 

Adult Couple: A man and woman in their early 30s, all ethnicities. 

Family: A dad (30-40), mom (30–40), son (around 10), and daughter (around 8), all ethnicities. 

Active Adult Couple: A man and woman in their early 60s, grey haired preferred. 

If you're a fit, please send 2-3 pictures (one full body and one that clearly shows your face, no hat or sunglasses) to kari.white@comcast.net. 

Photo Credit: Kevin Steele
