items.text:
CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM

For an independent short film shooting near Stuttgart, we are looking for an elderly woman (75–90 years old) for a supporting role:

LUDMILLA IVANOVNA / LJUDA
• Woman · 75–90 years old
• Russian required
• German / English not important
• Face that tells a story

Character:
An elderly woman living in Germany the same way she used to live in the USSR. Strict but fair, and eager to help others by passing on traditions.

Logline:
A sleep-deprived daughter of Russian immigrants, struggling with lifelong sleep paralysis, discovers a new technique to escape her episodes.

Details:
• Preferably based near Stuttgart
• Unpaid / no-budget production
• Transportation & meals covered
• 1 shooting day around June 14th (exact date TBD)

Apply here:

[dreamwalking.film@gmail.com](mailto:dreamwalking.film@gmail.com)

———  

CASTING CALL — KURZFILM 

Für einen unabhängigen Kurzfilm im Raum Stuttgart suchen wir eine ältere Frau (75–90 Jahre) für eine Nebenrolle:

LUDMILLA IVANOVNA / LJUDA
• Frau · 75–90 Jahre alt
• Russisch erforderlich
• Deutsch / Englisch nicht wichtig
• Gesicht, das eine Geschichte erzählt

Charakter:
Ältere Frau, die in Deutschland noch immer so lebt wie früher in der UdSSR. Streng, aber fair und bemüht, Menschen durch die Weitergabe ihrer Traditionen zu helfen.

Logline:
Eine schlaflose Tochter russischer Immigrant:innen, die ihr ganzes Leben unter Schlafparalysen leidet, entdeckt eine neue Methode, sich daraus zu befreien.

Infos:
• Idealerweise aus dem Raum Stuttgart
• Unbezahlt / No-Budget-Produktion
• Anreise & Verpflegung werden übernommen
• 1 Drehtag um den 14. Juni (genaues Datum folgt)

Bewerbung an:
[dreamwalking.film@gmail.com](mailto:dreamwalking.film@gmail.com)

items.text:
Kære Alle. 

Vi søger akut statister til en reklamefilm, der filmes senere i dag. Vi filmer under Bispebuen i København fra klokken 19.30 - 21.00 

Vi søger både drenge og piger i alderen 15-17 år. Forældre/værge behøver ikke at deltage i optagelserne, men det er vigtigt at de skriver under på statistkontrakten. 

Hvis du eller dit barn er interesserede, så send gerne en SMS med et billede til vores koordinator Gül på følgende nummer: 42 53 23 22. 
Hun vil også kunne fortælle mere om optagelserne.

Jobbet er lønnet!

items.text:
Hey guys!! Happy Summer!!! Classes are now open for June! We teach the business part other classes leave out - how to get repped once you're ready for rep, how to make sure your headshots are working for you, how to expand rep into other markets, etc -- all while doing a deep dive into TV, film, and commercial. We also offer incredible, informative VO classes for actors wanting to get into voice work!  Would love to have you with us for June! Teachers have all been working in the business for 10+ years professionally. Come learn from Film/Commercial Casting Directors, NYC/LA agents, and VO casting professionals!

To learn more about the classes we offer, please visit: www.sarahdowlingcasting.com/actors

To register or ask any questions, please email us at: SarahDowlingCasting@gmail.com

Thanks!

items.text:
Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

items.text:
ANTIGONE
We are a new London-based international theatre ensemble. We are looking for an actor who identifies as male to play Haemon in our next RND project of "Antigone". Playing age 20-35, Haemon is Creon's son and Antigone's groom. Unpaid with expenses. Actor must be free in late July this year fir a show in Camden, but we working to stage it elsewhere in the future for a longer run. We need the actor to be free in evenings and/or week-ends  from now till the end of July. We can be flexible with rehearsal dates.

Pm me to get in touch

Afternoon, all.
Very last minute.com but my friend and I are making an internet series and we are in need of an actress to step in for our shoot tomorrow. 

It is unpaid, but of course you can use the footage for your showreel. It’s a mix of script/ improv. 

We are shooting in Holmfirth, West Yorkshire.  Please DM if you feel you’d be suitable, please see requirements below. 

Requirements: 

Previous experience acting in front of the camera (short films is fine). 

Age range 25-35 

Please DM for more info. 

Many thanks! 🙂

items.text:
Due to unforseen circumstances we are recasting for our tour of the children’s theatre show, “Tom Gates Live”, based on the popular book series by Liz Pichon.

The show is written and directed by Miranda Larson with songs and music by Barrie Bignold and is produced by Mark Thompson at MT Productions.

Production dates:

Tour dates June – Oct 2026. We are currently have 35 dates over this period. 

This production will be based around London so the successful candidate will need a base in London or the surrounding area. 

**Tom Gates (Male, 16 years - 23 years)**

Tom Gates is an easily distracted and creative 10-year-old boy who loves doodling, listening to music, and annoying his older sister, Delia.

We are looking for a musical theatre performer that can sing, perform slapstick and comedy, and can perform the role of a young boy. He needs to be strictly 5'10" tall or smaller. 

Within the show, there is basic singing, dancing and movement but nothing too technical.

 

The successful applicant will need to be comfortable assisting with the load ins/ outs and have a full UK drivers licence as they will be asked to assist driving the touring cast car.

Playing age:

16 years - 23 years

Height:

147 — 178 cm

Gender:

Male

Contract info:

Show day fee: £150

Travel day fee: £50

Subsistence: £20

Please send CV's & headshots to 

casting.mtproductions@gmail.com

items.text: I går aftes gik jeg ind i garagen, tændte lyset og så dette på væggen. Jeg er en voksen mand, men ærligt talt blev jeg virkelig bange. Så, da frygten var forsvundet, begyndte jeg at se nærmere på det og prøvede at forstå, hvad det var, men jeg kunne ikke finde ud af det. Er der nogen, der ved, hvad det er? Se den første kommentar for svaret.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of tick and text that says 'Hvad er det?'

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – OTHER MANS LIFE🎬

Seeking actors for our upcoming dramatic short film: THE OTHER MAN’S LIFE

A grounded psychological drama about two men from opposite worlds who trade lives for 24 hours, only to realize the life they wanted comes with consequences they never saw coming.

(UNPAID STUDENT SHORT‼️ trying to get the name out) 

Location: Raleigh/Durham area
 
Shoot date: June 11-13

EMAIL: eandmcinematic@gmail.com

ROLES:

• JACK (Lead) – Male, 35–45
Successful, wealthy, emotionally hollow. Corporate, sharp, controlled, carrying deep loneliness.

Everything fades sound fades and eyes become to black. c TO:'

A sleek briefcase, Inside: not your average -Two syringes, a vial of clear liquid, and a plastic cup.'

sharedPost.text:
Looking for : 
1.  Gaffer
2. Boom operator

Genre: Sci‑fi Drama / Psychological Thriller
Project : Low Budget
Duration: 45 minutes
Language :  English
Shooting Location : Berlin
Timeframe : Aug - Sep 2026

Synopsis:
Dr. Lukas Weber, a American-German AI scientist devoted to understanding the ethics of emotion, creates EVA‑9, a sentient female cyborg designed to learn empathy and feelings and pleasures. As Lukas begins teaching EVA principles of restraint, morality, and conventional boundaries, she starts questioning his logic — and, eventually, him. Through psychological and physical experiments exploring power dynamics, EVA turns his lessons around: instead of accepting the limits set for her, she redefines them.

Her challenge is not rebellion but revealation. She demonstrates, in carefully controlled encounters, that what society views as taboo or submissive can be willingly chosen, empowering, and pleasurable when defined by consent. Lukas, confronted by his own discomfort and assumptions about femininity, finds himself wiped out — learning from EVA that strength and sensuality coexist, and that freedom lies in accepting the full spectrum of emotional experience.

Cyborg merges futuristic science with timeless questions about control, pleasure, and equality — asking whether humans, or machines, are better equipped to understand the moral depth of desire.

Main Cast :

    Dr. Lukas Weber – 40-50 years old: rational, moral, yet internally conflicted as his control erodes.
    EVA‑9 – 20-25 years old: Short Height 150-165 cm : White girl, sharp features, Lips augmentation preferred
     Poised, intelligent, and fearless in exploring     emotional truth.

items.text:
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld.
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT

The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging

- Family dynamics & generational conflict

- Love, relationships & marriage

- Crime & survival in urban environments

- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects

- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.

The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. Preferably London based. We already have tons of applicants who have applied from other parts of the UK. We are now focused on 'London' applications.

Age Range: Open to all age groups

Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:

Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements

upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued

with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.

❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:

Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing

Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. We Highly advice to follow these simple rules because we are busy organising the project. 

E-Mail Applications to: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

URBAN DRAMA-THRILLER EXPLORING THE BRITISH SOUTH ASIAN COMMUNITY WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR: BRITISH SOUTH ASIAN (DESI) TALENT UK BORN RAISED AGES 8+ EXPERIENCED OR NEW ACTORS AUDITIONS FILMING LONDON OTHER LOCATIONS REHEARSALSI NORTH LONDON COMPENSATION •INDUSTRY STANDARD RATES CONTRACTS ISSUED PON FU FULL PRODUCT TION DRAMA CRIME CULTURE TABOO READ CAREFULLY SERIOUSAPPLICANTSON SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY TRAINING CHARACTER DEVELOPMENT MAJOR STREAMING TV NETWORKS'
